heading: Population, health, and nutrition programs
label: 262p–4m Population, health, and nutrition programs
text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall instruct the United States Executive Director of the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development to urge the bank to support an increase in the amount the bank lends annually to support population, health, and nutrition programs of the borrower countries.
notes: DefinitionsThe definitions in apply to this section.section 262p–5 of this title
